opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My whole lower back has locked up solid, like it's set in cement, and there's this burning pain deep in my back and backside. It came on hard over the last day or two and now I literally can't stand up or walk — I'm stuck flat on my back in bed. I'm also completely wiped out, can barely keep my eyes open. I've taken the maximum paracetamol and ibuprofen and it's done nothing.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The pain and stiffness got dramatically worse in the last 24 hours and I can't get out of bed or walk to the bathroom safely on my own.

symptom_narrative.onset: started about two days ago and got a lot worse in the last day
symptom_narrative.character: burning, deep aching, and a locked-up rigid feeling with muscle spasm
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: about a 9 out of 10, some of the worst I've had
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: low back and both sides of my backside/buttocks
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: worst when I've been lying still or first thing in the morning; it actually eases a little once I get moving
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: moving around gently seems to loosen it slightly, and I get very stiff after resting
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: staying still, lying in bed, and the mornings — I was stiff for hours this morning
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: I feel utterly exhausted, but no fevers or chills that I've noticed
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I get flare-ups of my joint condition now and then but this is the worst it's been
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: can't get out of bed, can't walk or stand, worried about falling since I live on my own

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: psoriatic arthritis (a joint condition linked to my psoriasis)
past_medical_history.how_managed: usually managed with anti-inflammatory tablets, followed up by a specialist

current_medications_as_reported.dose_as_patient_reports: took the maximum for the day
took the maximum daily amount today

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone, no one else in the house to help right now, worried about falling getting to the bathroom

objective_data_offered.value: some dry, scaly, slightly red patches of skin on both elbows
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient/video self-report of skin appearance, not a clinician examination

objective_data_offered.value: lying rigidly flat on my back, can't roll or twist without a spike of severe pain, can't sit up or stand
haven't measured it but I don't feel hot or feverish
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: no thermometer used — patient impression only
